# Content playbook (Machine 3 + 6, detailed)

Turnkey templates + copy formulas for the recurring-content and product-as-distribution machines. Strategy summary in `autonomous-growth.md`.

---

## Weekly email digest (Machine 3a)

**Name:** "Fim de semana na praia" (or "Praia smart · sexta")
**Send:** Friday ~9h BRT, year-round; daily during summer peak (Dec-Feb)
**Generated by:** Claude from conditions + balneabilidade + agito data

### Template structure
```
ASSUNTO: Fim de semana na praia — {melhor praia da região} tá top 🏖️

[hero line] Bom dia! Olha como vão estar as praias neste fim de semana ({datas}):

🏄 PRA SURFAR: {beach} — {one-line why}
🏊 PRA NADAR:  {beach} — {one-line why}
☀️ PRA FAMÍLIA: {beach} — {one-line why}

⚠️ ATENÇÃO: {beaches imprópria this week, if any} tá(ão) impróprias pra banho ({fonte}).

[per region the subscriber cares about — Rio / SP / SC / NE block]
{compact table: beach · sábado · domingo · água}

Ver tudo em tempo real → praiasmart.com

[footer] Você recebe porque assinou em praiasmart.com · descadastrar
```

### Rules
- Subject line carries the value (a specific beach + benefit), never generic
- Água alerts up top — that's the "open every time" hook
- One-tap link to the live site
- Segment by region once the list is big enough (Rio subs don't need Natal data)
- Honor unsubscribe immediately (deliverability)

### List building
- "📩 receba as condições no seu email toda sexta" signup on every page (Claude builds form → stores to email-API audience)
- Offer a reason: "saiba antes de sair de casa se a água tá própria"

---

## Daily auto-social (Machine 3b) — caption formulas

Video rendering spec is in `tiktok-bot.md`. Captions/copy below.

### Format A — daily beach snapshot
```
{Beach} agora 🌊 {date}

mar: {good/calm/forte}
água: {própria/imprópria} ({fonte})
melhor horário: {window}

condições completas no link 🔗 (praiasmart.com)

#{cidade} #praia #{beachname} #verão #balneabilidade #mar
```

### Format B — água-imprópria alert (the viral one)
```
⚠️ ATENÇÃO: {Beach} tá IMPRÓPRIA pra banho hoje

A {agency} detectou {reason}. Evita o banho até a próxima análise.

Confirma no link antes de ir 🔗

#{cidade} #praia #saúde #balneabilidade #{beachname}
```

### Format C — weekend roundup (Fridays)
```
Pra onde ir esse fim de semana? 🏖️ {region}

surfar → {beach}
nadar → {beach}
família → {beach}

condições ao vivo no link 🔗

#fimdesemana #{cidade} #praia #verão
```

### Hashtag strategy
- Always: city tag + #praia + beach name + #verão (in season)
- Água alerts: add #saúde #balneabilidade (broader, public-interest reach)
- Don't over-tag (5-8 max); TikTok BR favors tight tagging
- Rotate 3-4 caption templates so the algorithm doesn't see sameness

### Posting cadence
- Sep: 3x/week (algorithm warm-up), top 3 beaches
- Oct-Nov: daily, top 5 beaches
- Dec-Feb: daily + every água-imprópria flip (instant) + weekend roundups
- Cross-post all to Reels + Shorts (zero marginal cost via scheduler)

---

## Água-imprópria auto-broadcast (Machine 6b) — the highest-share moment

When a beach flips imprópria, Claude auto-generates + fires across ALL channels simultaneously:

| Channel | Artifact |
|---|---|
| TikTok/Reels/Shorts | Format B video |
| Twitter/X | "⚠️ {Beach} imprópria pra banho hoje — {agency}. Detalhes: {link}" |
| Instagram Story | branded alert card + "link na bio" |
| Email | breaking alert to that region's subscribers |
| WhatsApp broadcast | one-line + link |
| Push notification (PWA) | "⚠️ {Beach} imprópria hoje" |
| Site | alert banner on the beach page (already built) |

**Why it's the best organic engine:** public-health urgency + "eu avisei" social currency = people screenshot and share. It's useful, timely, and slightly alarming — the exact recipe for organic spread. Lean in hard during summer.

**Guardrail:** only fire on a genuine status change (not every refresh). Debounce. Cite the agency + date every time — credibility is the whole product.

---

## Share-card generator (Machine 6a) — the viral substrate

**What:** one-tap "compartilhar" on any beach → renders a clean branded image card → WhatsApp / IG Story / copy-link.

**Card contents:**
- Beach name + posto + city
- Current: mar state, água status (color-coded), UV, best window
- A small live-cam thumbnail or the sun-arc viz
- praiasmart.com watermark + the beach's short URL
- Timestamp ("agora · 14h32")

**Why first to build:** it turns every user into a distributor. Every other machine (digest, social, alerts) feeds people to the site; the share card makes them re-broadcast outward. It's the multiplier on all organic traffic.

**Tech:** server-side render (Pillow / SVG→PNG / a serverless OG-image function) OR client-side canvas. Must look great in a WhatsApp preview (the dominant BR share surface).

---

## Distribution seeding copy (Machine 4)

### Forum/Reddit answer template (human posts, Claude drafts)
When someone asks "como tá o mar em {beach} hoje?" / "{beach} tá própria pra banho?":
> Dá pra ver em tempo real aqui: praiasmart.com/{slug} — tem câmera ao vivo, balneabilidade do {agency} e as condições atualizadas. {direct helpful answer to their specific question}.

Rule: answer the question genuinely FIRST, link second. Never drop a bare link. Only where genuinely helpful, or it's spam (and gets removed + hurts us).

### Wikipedia citation (human posts)
On pt.wikipedia beach articles, add live-conditions external link in "Ligações externas":
`* [https://praiasmart.com/{slug} Condições e balneabilidade em tempo real - praia smart]`
Rule: must be genuinely useful + disclosed. Undisclosed automated edits get banned.

---

## Content calendar at a glance

| Cadence | Artifact | Machine | Channel |
|---|---|---|---|
| Real-time | água-imprópria broadcast | 6b | all |
| Daily (summer) | beach snapshot video | 3b | TikTok/IG/Shorts |
| Daily (summer) | email digest | 3a | email |
| Friday | weekend roundup video + email | 3b/3a | social + email |
| Weekly | 3-5 distribution-seeding actions | 4 | forums/wiki/directories |
| Weekly | ~30 outreach drafts | 2 | email |
| Monthly | mini balneabilidade data post | 1 | site + social |
| Quarterly | flagship data report + press | 1 | press + site |

## Owner split (whole content machine)
- **Claude:** generate every artifact (videos, emails, captions, cards, reports, drafts)
- **Human (Tier-0):** click send/post
- **Tier-1 (email API + social scheduler):** Claude sends + posts + tracks; human reviews a weekly digest of what went out + engagement
